summary: 6 film announcements, 4 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Mourinho
film.announcement: Teaser for Netflix sports documentary about legendary football manager José Mourinho drops with global launch date revealed.

film.title: Hunt: We Need To Talk About James
film.announcement: Feature documentary on legendary late Formula 1 driver James Hunt goes into production.

film.title: We Won't Let the Goat Die
film.announcement: Fantastic Lab winner bolstered by new partners and director Santiago Durán attachment.

film.title: Spells to Revive a Witch
film.announcement: Film about mythical fortune teller Soralla de Persia receives backing from Spain and Uruguay.

film.title: Untitled Hilda Hidalgo Third Fiction Project
film.announcement: Director Hilda Hidalgo readies her third fiction film about sexual abuse after acclaimed dramas 'Of Love and Other Demons' and 'Violeta at Last'.

film.title: Punjabi Films Slate
film.talent: Ammy Virk, Neeru Bajwa, Harrdy Sandhu
film.announcement: Panorama Studios acquires Punjabi films starring Ammy Virk, Neeru Bajwa, and Harrdy Sandhu for worldwide release.

tv.title: Anne Rice's Mayfair Witches
tv.announcement: Season 3 teaser released featuring Alexandra Daddario.

tv.title: The Real Housewives of London
tv.announcement: Season 2 premiere date set at Hayu with cast photos revealed.

tv.title: Love Island USA
tv.announcement: Season 8 reunion sets August premiere with Andy Cohen and Ariana Madix as hosts.

tv.title: House of the Dragon
tv.announcement: Season 3 confirms a huge change to one character's ending.
